document.source_title: RCB vs MI Playing 11, IPL 2026 Today Match: Questions over Pandya, SKY’s availability as Mumbai stare down the barrel

claims.claim_text: Hardik Pandya's availability for the match is uncertain.
claims.evidence_text: It remains to be seen if captain Hardik Pandya can make it, having sat out in their previous match.

claims.claim_text: Phil Salt will miss the match due to injury.
claims.evidence_text: They are desperately missing the bumper starts that Phil Salt provides them, with the opener set to be sitting out of Sunday’s match as well with the finger injury.

entities.name: Hardik Pandya
entities.description: Captain of Mumbai Indians, uncertain for the match.
entities.evidence_text: It remains to be seen if captain Hardik Pandya can make it, having sat out in their previous match.

entities.name: Phil Salt
entities.description: Opener for RCB, missing the match due to injury.
entities.evidence_text: They are desperately missing the bumper starts that Phil Salt provides them, with the opener set to be sitting out of Sunday’s match as well with the finger injury.

entities.name: Mumbai Indians
entities.description: Team in IPL 2026, facing elimination if they lose.
entities.evidence_text: MI, on the other hand, would know that a defeat here would officially end any chances they have of making the playoffs.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: Team in IPL 2026, suffered a second consecutive defeat.
entities.evidence_text: RCB, on the other hand, suffered a second consecutive defeat in their previous match against Rajasthan Royals.
